purpose: Establish the authoritative bytes of the 2026-07-12 Stage-3 Equivalent-Formulation Retry countersign (and its bound erratum) BEFORE a successor Design-A prospective adjudication may claim to supersede it. Governance ruling docs/review/comments.md (final), section 5.
authored_context: Executed under the owner's final ruling. Document-only; no Stage-3 execution.

bound_erratum.recovery_provenance: Rescued byte-exact from local git stash e7774f6 ('untracked files on research/mr002-preregistration') per commit f3d0d15; had existed only inside that stash prior. Bytes at the committed lowercase path resolve exactly to the countersign's bound hash.
bound_erratum.determination: AUTHORITATIVE — committed bytes, hash matches the countersign binding.

git_provenance.commit_subject: docs(mr-002): combined erratum — Execution Availability (A) + ECI Semantics (B), FOR SIGNATURE
git_provenance.history: single commit; the bytes 7deae8c4... have never been modified since b972f72
git_provenance.note: Committed the SAME DAY as the countersign_date (2026-07-12), by the countersigner, within a multi-artifact FOR-SIGNATURE bundle whose subject line names two OTHER errata (Execution Availability / ECI) but which also added this Stage-3 Retry countersign.

countersign_candidates.relationship_to_candidate_1: BYTE-IDENTICAL to the committed authoritative copy (same sha256, same length). Non-authoritative working duplicate.

methodological_note.initial_error_corrected: A first pass mistakenly concluded the countersign was 'never committed'. Cause: `git log`/`git ls-files` queried with UPPERCASE `Docs/...` pathspecs, which return empty because git tracks the file at LOWERCASE `docs/...` (case-insensitive Windows filesystem; the known capital-Docs pathspec trap). Re-querying with the lowercase pathspec surfaced commit b972f72. This census reflects the corrected finding.

determination.unique_byte_identity: YES — sha256 7deae8c4..., 3694 bytes, LF, JSON-valid; the committed copy and the untracked review copy are byte-identical.
determination.contemporaneous_provenance: ESTABLISHED — committed 2026-07-12 18:51:29 (commit b972f72), same day as the countersign date, by the countersigner (Jay Wang), added and never modified. This is an independent dated chain-of-custody, not merely owner attestation.
determination.binding_resolution: The candidate's embedded erratum hash (9ce8f53a...), path, byte length (13764) and line endings (LF) resolve EXACTLY to the AUTHORITATIVE committed erratum (preserved at f3d0d15). The countersign binds a preserved, hash-verified artifact.
determination.disposition: AUTHORITATIVE. The 2026-07-12 Stage-3 Equivalent-Formulation Retry countersign is uniquely identified by its bytes sha256 7deae8c4..., committed contemporaneously at b972f72, binding erratum 9ce8f53a.

supersession_precondition_status: MET. The superseded authority is precisely identified (countersign 7deae8c4 @ b972f72, 2026-07-12; bound erratum 9ce8f53a @ f3d0d15). A successor Design-A prospective adjudication may reference and supersede it by these bound identities. Supersession affects only the SUCCESSOR execution; it does not retroactively validate the quarantined 2026-07-13 cascade change.
